summary: Tested new admin system: login page at /admin/login, dashboard at /admin with all stat cards, charts, users table, tier change, logout. Fixed 2 critical bugs: (1) missing HelpWidget import in App.js causing entire app blank, (2) /api/admin/users returning 500 due to mixed datetime/str comparison in sort. After fixes, all features working.

issues: Duplicate React keys in users table (console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key') — minor, not visible to user

action_items: Fix duplicate React keys warning in users table (AdminPage.js) — low priority
critical_code_review_comments: HelpWidget was used in App.js (line 240) but never imported — caused entire AppRouter to crash with white screen. FIXED: added import.
admin_users endpoint sorted results with `x.get('created_at', '')` which fails when some records have datetime objects instead of strings. FIXED: wrapped with str().
test_credentials: admin@courtbound.com / admin123 (set in backend/.env as ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin system fully functional after 2 bug fixes. Login at /admin/login with email+password form (dark theme). Dashboard shows: 4 stat cards (Total Users=15, Active 7d=0, Emails Sent=190, Colleges Tracked=83), Signup Trend line chart, Subscription Breakdown (100% Free), Email Activity bar chart, Top 10 colleges list, full users table with Change Tier dropdown. Logout redirects to /admin/login. All 13 backend tests pass.

rca_of_issues.root_cause: HelpWidget component used in App.js AppRouter return JSX (line 240) but the import was missing. This caused a JavaScript ReferenceError at runtime, crashing the React component tree and rendering a blank screen.

The result.sort() in admin_users used `x.get('created_at', '')` as sort key. Some MongoDB records had created_at stored as datetime objects (not ISO strings), causing `TypeError: '<' not supported between instances of 'datetime.datetime' and 'str'`.
rca_of_issues.fix: Changed sort key to `str(x.get('created_at', ''))` to normalize all values to strings before comparison.
